overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The player character crosses a wet neon-lit intersection and proceeds along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing by the Cirrus bar and other urban details.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with wet pavement and neon signage

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath elevated highway from open intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet intersection toward the covered sidewalk area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red hoodie walking parallel to camera path

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated billboards and neon accents against the dusk sky
bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
rain-slicked dark asphalt reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
massive concrete overpass and highway ramps with teal structural accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection during dusk, with wet streets reflecting vibrant neon signs from towering glass buildings. The camera moves forward across the yellow-striped crosswalk, following a pedestrian in a red hoodie, and approaches the entrance to a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete corridor beneath elevated highway with infrastructure elements

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit concrete corridor under the highway overpass

entered.detail: massive brutalist concrete highway deck with geometric support pillars and teal accent panels
bright purple automated vending machine with glowing interface panels
staircase leading up to the elevated highway level with metal railings
safety barriers with orange tops lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving into the covered area beneath the elevated highway, the environment shifts to darker artificial lighting and concrete architecture. The walkway is flanked by a purple vending machine and concrete stairs on the left, with orange safety railings on the right, while the massive highway structure looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon-lit bar frontage under overpass

events.description: passing the illuminated Cirrus bar with prominent red and blue neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing the Cirrus bar and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking toward the camera direction

entered.detail: prominent red and blue neon signs reading 'CIRRUS' mounted on the building facade
large planters with illuminated tropical foliage lining the bar entrance
large digital screens displaying animated advertisements on building walls

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens into a commercial area featuring the Cirrus bar, distinguished by vibrant neon signage and illuminated planters with tropical plants. The camera continues along the sidewalk under the persistent concrete overpass, passing pedestrians and various neon advertisements while the environment maintains its cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass walkway with green ambient lighting and small commercial structures

events.description: approaching area with distinct green lighting illuminating the underpass ceiling

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway past small buildings and newspaper stands

notable_agents.action: npc leaning against green railing near newspaper vending rack

entered.detail: compact two-story structure with blue LED lighting and metal security shutters
metal rack filled with packaged newspapers and magazines near green railings
concrete ceiling illuminated with distinctive green lighting creating an eerie glow
tall digital display showing advertisements and city information

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the covered urban walkway, passing a small blue building with security shutters and a newspaper vending rack. The environment transitions to an area with distinct green lighting illuminating the underpass ceiling ahead, while the camera moves past NPCs standing near railings and various street furniture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, open city intersection into the shadowed, neon-lit corridors beneath an elevated highway. It begins by crossing a wet, yellow-striped intersection reflecting the glow of towering glass buildings, following a pedestrian in a red hoodie toward a covered walkway. As the camera moves under the massive concrete highway structure, the environment shifts to darker artificial lighting, passing a purple vending machine and orange safety railings. The scene then opens into a commercial stretch featuring the vibrant neon signage and tropical plants of the Cirrus bar before continuing past a blue building with security shutters and a newspaper rack. Finally, the camera proceeds deeper into the underpass, moving past idling pedestrians as the overhead lighting transitions into a distinct green glow.
